items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures rebound as Trump tempers tariff talk toward China
items.description: US stock futures jumped Sunday night following Trump's retreat from combative comments on China last Friday.

items.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise As Trump Says 'Eternity' Before Extra 100% China Tariff
items.description: Dow Jones Futures Rise As Trump Says 'Eternity' Before Extra 100% China Tariff

items.title: Shutdown Enters Week 2. Plus, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan, Bank of America, Taiwan Semi, and More Stocks to Watch This Week.
items.description: The consumer price index will be delayed until next week as a result of the government shutdown, but the producer price index is still on track for release. And we’ll see earnings from Wells Fargo, Morgan Stanley, ASML, and more.

items.title: Trade Tensions, Market Volatility and Other Key Things to Watch this Week
items.description: Markets enter a critical week following Friday's dramatic selloff triggered by President Trump's threat of "massive tariffs" against China over tighter rare-earth export rules.

items.title: Wall Street Brunch: Earnings Offer Certainty In Volatile Week To Come
